home.title: All Your Favorite Tools, One Place
home.subtitle: No install · Use instantly

char-count.title: Character Counter
char-count.desc: Count characters, words, and lines in real time

json-format.title: JSON Formatter
json-format.desc: Format, validate, and minify JSON instantly

qr-code.title: QR Code Generator
qr-code.desc: Convert URLs or text to QR codes instantly

color-converter.title: Color Code Converter
color-converter.desc: Convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL color codes

mobile-line-break.title: Mobile Line Breaker
mobile-line-break.desc: Auto line-break text to fit mobile screen width

whitespace-remove.title: Whitespace Remover
whitespace-remove.desc: Remove leading, trailing, and duplicate spaces

case-converter.title: Case Converter
case-converter.desc: Convert to UPPER / lower / Title Case

base64-converter.title: Base64 Converter
base64-converter.error: Decode error: not a valid Base64 string

json-validator.title: JSON Validator
json-validator.desc: Find and highlight JSON syntax errors

csv-to-json.title: CSV → JSON
csv-to-json.desc: Convert CSV files to JSON format

jpg-to-png.title: JPG → PNG
jpg-to-png.desc: Convert JPG and JPEG images to PNG in your browser
jpg-to-png.dropHint: Your image stays on this device and is converted locally
jpg-to-png.invalidFile: Please choose a JPG or JPEG image.
jpg-to-png.convertError: Could not convert this image. Try another JPG file.
jpg-to-png.emptyPreview: Converted PNG preview will appear here

png-to-webp.title: PNG → WebP
png-to-webp.desc: Convert PNG images to smaller WebP files
png-to-webp.convertError: Could not convert this image. Try another PNG file.
png-to-webp.emptyPreview: Converted WebP preview will appear here

img-compress.title: Image Compressor
img-compress.desc: Reduce file size while keeping quality
img-compress.dropHint: Supports JPG, PNG, and WebP. Processing stays on this device
img-compress.maxWidthHint: Use 0 to keep the original width
img-compress.invalidFile: Please choose a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
img-compress.convertError: Could not compress this image. Try another file.
img-compress.emptyPreview: Compressed image preview will appear here

img-resize.title: Image Resizer
img-resize.desc: Resize images by pixels or percentage
img-resize.dropHint: Supports JPG, PNG, and WebP. Resize locally in your browser
img-resize.invalidFile: Please choose a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
img-resize.convertError: Could not resize this image. Try another file.
img-resize.emptyPreview: Resized image preview will appear here

img-crop.title: Image Crop
img-crop.desc: Crop any region of your image
img-crop.dropHint: Supports JPG, PNG, and WebP. Crop locally in your browser
img-crop.dragHint: Drag across the image to select a crop area
img-crop.invalidFile: Please choose a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
img-crop.convertError: Could not crop this image. Try another file.
img-crop.emptyPreview: Cropped image preview will appear here

favicon-gen.title: Favicon Generator
favicon-gen.desc: Generate ICO, PNG, and SVG favicon files
favicon-gen.dropTitle: Drop a logo or image here
favicon-gen.dropHint: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, and SVG. Everything is generated locally
favicon-gen.invalidFile: Please choose a JPG, PNG, WebP, or SVG image.
favicon-gen.convertError: Could not generate favicon files. Try another image.
favicon-gen.emptyPreview: Generated favicon files will appear here

img-blur.title: Image Blur
img-blur.dropHint: Supports JPG, PNG, and WebP. Blur locally in your browser
img-blur.fullHint: The full image will be blurred
img-blur.dragHint: Drag across the image to choose the area to blur
img-blur.invalidFile: Please choose a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
img-blur.convertError: Could not blur this image. Try another file.
img-blur.emptyPreview: Blurred image preview will appear here

img-rotate.title: Image Rotate/Flip
img-rotate.dropHint: Supports JPG, PNG, and WebP. Rotate locally in your browser
img-rotate.invalidFile: Please choose a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
img-rotate.convertError: Could not rotate this image. Try another file.
img-rotate.emptyPreview: Rotated image preview will appear here

img-size-reduce.title: Image Size Reducer
img-size-reduce.desc: Compress to a target KB size
img-size-reduce.dropHint: Supports JPG, PNG, and WebP. Finds a smaller file automatically
img-size-reduce.invalidFile: Please choose a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
img-size-reduce.convertError: Could not reduce this image. Try another file.
img-size-reduce.emptyPreview: Reduced image preview will appear here
